description_long: This is a set of two round, nested coffee tables with a modern, minimalist design. Both tables feature smooth, circular wooden tops with visible natural wood grain patterns, supported by sturdy, angular wooden legs connected by black metal crossbars. The larger table is taller and overlaps the smaller one, which can be partially tucked underneath for space-saving or decorative arrangements. The wood appears to be finished with a matte or semi-matte coating, highlighting the natural texture and color variations. The legs are robust and geometrically arranged, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a clean and functional look.
description: A pair of round, nested wooden coffee tables with black metal crossbars and a minimalist, modern design. The tables feature smooth wood tops and sturdy, angular legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two round tables, with the smaller table partially tucked under the larger one, highlighting their nesting design and the wood grain on the tabletops.
description_view_1: Angled view emphasizing the height difference and overlapping arrangement of the tables, as well as the black metal crossbars connecting the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the circular tabletop of the larger table, with the smaller table mostly hidden behind it.
description_view_3: Side view showing the full profiles of both tables, their relative sizes, and the geometric arrangement of the legs and crossbars.
attribute_number_of_legs: Each table has three angular wooden legs connected by metal crossbars
